title: pyrus malus var. acerba
intro: Pyrus malus var. acerba, also known as the unripe or green apple, is a variety of the common apple (Pyrus malus) that is often used in herbal medicine. The unripe green apple has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Pyrus malus var. acerba include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Pyrus malus var. acerba can be made by infusing the raw green apple in water or by creating a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
